reason: SPEC_TRACKING.md v1.1 is correctly synchronized with SRS.md v1.1. All 8 FR rows preserve original descriptions (only SRS line ranges updated). NFR Tracking Matrix added with full 8-row coverage including NFR-08 (Security). Change Log documents the v1.1 update with specific change details (line-number shift, new NFR matrix, expanded open questions, R5-R8 references). Coverage statistics updated to combined FR+NFR totals (16 items) with per-dimension breakdowns. All 9 coverage-check invariants pass. Line citations are internally sequential and consistent with SRS structure. Security content (NFR-08, S2.6, R5-R8, error rows 6-7) is properly cited and linked to SPEC source lines per control-group no-new-requirements rule. No FR descriptions incorrectly changed.

gaps.message: Cannot independently verify every SRS.md line-number citation (text provided without line numbers); citations are internally consistent and sequential but absolute accuracy unverifiable in this review context.

Open Questions section flags 14 items for downstream clarification -- none block P1 sign-off, but the NFR-08 questions about security posture measurability and adversarial test coverage may need P2 design resolution.
Coverage checks cite NFR section as SRS.md L278-L298 but individual NFR row citations span L284-L291 -- does L278-L298 include the trailing notes paragraph? Minor ambiguity in section-vs-row scope.
